# Airhop

> Private, offline-first peer-to-peer messaging over Bluetooth mesh for iOS and Android.

Airhop is an open-source iOS and Android app for censorship-resistant communication. It works with zero internet connectivity using Bluetooth Low Energy mesh networking with multi-hop relay (up to 7 hops). When internet is available, Nostr relays serve as an internet bridge.

## Key Features

- Bluetooth mesh: communicate with no internet, messages relay up to 7 hops
- End-to-end encryption: Noise XX handshake, Double Ratchet forward secrecy
- Offline payments: ecash tokens sent directly over BLE
- No accounts: identity is an Ed25519 key pair stored in OS Keychain
- Tor integration: iOS (Arti) and Android (Orbot)
- bitchat compatible: Airhop and bitchat nodes interoperate on the same mesh
- Panic wipe: triple-tap destroys all keys and messages in under one second
